fields.enable_audit_trail: In accordance with MCA Notification dated 24-03-2021, enabling this feature will ensure that each change made to the books of account gets recorded. Once enabled, this feature cannot be disabled.
fields.enable_immutable_ledger: On enabling this cancellation entries will be posted on the actual cancellation date and reports will consider cancelled entries as well
fields.check_supplier_invoice_uniqueness: Enabling this ensures each Purchase Invoice has a unique value in Supplier Invoice No. field within a particular fiscal year
fields.automatically_fetch_payment_terms: Payment Terms from orders will be fetched into the invoices as is
fields.allow_multi_currency_invoices_against_si: Enabling this will allow creation of multi-currency invoices against single party account in company currency
fields.confirm_before_resetting_posting_date: If enabled, user will be alerted before resetting posting date to current date in relevant transactions
fields.enable_accounting_dimensions: Enable cost center, projects and other custom accounting dimensions
fields.enable_discounts_and_margin: Apply discounts and margins on products
fields.merge_similar_account_heads: Rows with Same Account heads will be merged on Ledger
fields.book_deferred_entries_based_on: If "Months" is selected, a fixed amount will be booked as deferred revenue or expense for each month irrespective of the number of days in a month. It will be prorated if deferred revenue or expense is not booked for an entire month
fields.book_deferred_entries_via_journal_entry: If this is unchecked, direct GL entries will be created to book deferred revenue or expense
fields.submit_journal_entries: If this is unchecked Journal Entries will be saved in a Draft state and will have to be submitted manually
fields.determine_address_tax_category_from: Address used to determine Tax Category in transactions
fields.add_taxes_from_taxes_and_charges_templat: If no taxes are set, and Taxes and Charges Template is selected, the system will automatically apply the taxes from the chosen template.
fields.book_tax_discount_loss: Split Early Payment Discount Loss into Income and Tax Loss
fields.round_row_wise_tax: Tax Amount will be rounded on a row(items) level
fields.allow_pegged_currencies_exchange_rates:
System will do an implicit conversion using the pegged currency.
Ex: Instead of AED -> INR, system will do AED -> USD -> INR using the pegged exchange rate of AED against USD.
fields.auto_reconciliation_job_trigger: Interval should be between 1 to 59 MInutes
fields.reconciliation_queue_size: Documents Processed on each trigger. Queue Size should be between 5 and 100
fields.over_billing_allowance: The percentage you are allowed to bill more against the amount ordered. For example, if the order value is $100 for an item and tolerance is set as 10%, then you are allowed to bill up to $110
fields.role_allowed_to_over_bill: Users with this role are allowed to over bill above the allowance percentage
fields.calculate_depr_using_total_days: Enable this option to calculate daily depreciation by considering the total number of days in the entire depreciation period, (including leap years) while using daily pro-rata based depreciation
fields.role_to_notify_on_depreciation_failure: Users with this role will be notified if the asset depreciation gets failed
fields.ignore_account_closing_balance: Financial reports will be generated using GL Entry doctypes (should be enabled if Period Closing Voucher is not posted for all years sequentially or missing)
fields.general_ledger_remarks_length: Truncates 'Remarks' column to set character length
fields.receivable_payable_remarks_length: Truncates 'Remarks' column to set character length
fields.ignore_is_opening_check_for_reporting: Ignores legacy Is Opening field in GL Entry that allows adding opening balance post the system is in use while generating reports
fields.enable_party_matching: Auto match and set the Party in Bank Transactions
fields.enable_fuzzy_matching: Approximately match the description/party name against parties
fields.create_pr_in_draft_status: Payment Requests made from Sales / Purchase Invoice will be put in Draft explicitly

page.purpose: Default settings for your stock-related transactions

fields.valuation_method: How stock value is calculated — FIFO (First In First Out) or Moving Average.
fields.item_group: Category the item belongs to (e.g., Timber, Hardware, Wardrobes).
fields.default_warehouse: The warehouse where this item is stored by default.
fields.stock_uom: The default unit of measure for stocking this item (e.g., Nos, Kg, Sheet, Cubic Foot).
fields.allow_uom_with_conversion_rate_defined_i: If enabled, the system will allow selecting UOMs in sales and purchase transactions only if the conversion rate is set in the item master.
fields.over_delivery_receipt_allowance: The percentage you are allowed to receive or deliver more against the quantity ordered. For example, if you have ordered 100 units, and your Allowance is 10%, then you are allowed to receive 110 units.
fields.mr_qty_allowance: The percentage you are allowed to transfer more against the quantity ordered. For example, if you have ordered 100 units, and your Allowance is 10%, then you are allowed transfer 110 units.
fields.over_picking_allowance: The percentage you are allowed to pick more items in the pick list than the ordered quantity.
fields.role_allowed_to_over_deliver_receive: Users with this role are allowed to over deliver/receive against orders above the allowance percentage
fields.allow_internal_transfer_at_arms_length_p: If enabled, the item rate won't adjust to the valuation rate during internal transfers, but accounting will still use the valuation rate. This will allow the user to specify a different rate for printing or taxation purposes.
fields.validate_material_transfer_warehouses: If enabled, the source and target warehouse in the Material Transfer Stock Entry must be different else an error will be thrown. If inventory dimensions are present, same source and target warehouse can be allowed but atleast any one of the inventory dimension fields must be different.
fields.do_not_use_batchwise_valuation: If enabled, the system will use the moving average valuation method to calculate the valuation rate for the batched items and will not consider the individual batch-wise incoming rate.
fields.use_serial_batch_fields: On submission of the stock transaction, system will auto create the Serial and Batch Bundle based on the Serial No / Batch fields.
fields.do_not_update_serial_batch_on_creation_o:
If enabled, do not update serial / batch values in the stock transactions on creation of auto Serial 
 / Batch Bundle.
fields.allow_negative_stock_for_batch: If enabled, the system will allow negative stock entries for the batch. But, this may lead to incorrect valuation rates, so it is recommended to avoid using this option. The system will permit negative stock only when it is caused by backdated entries and will validate and block negative stock in all other cases.
fields.enable_stock_reservation: Allows to keep aside a specific quantity of inventory for a particular order.
fields.auto_reserve_stock: Upon submission of the Sales Order, Work Order, or Production Plan, the system will automatically reserve the stock.
fields.allow_partial_reservation: Partial stock can be reserved. For example, If you have a Sales Order of 100 units and the Available Stock is 90 units then a Stock Reservation Entry will be created for 90 units.
fields.auto_reserve_stock_for_sales_order_on_pu: Stock will be reserved on submission of Purchase Receipt created against Material Request for Sales Order.
fields.auto_reserve_serial_and_batch: Serial and Batch Nos will be auto-reserved based on Pick Serial / Batch Based On
fields.stock_frozen_upto: No stock transactions can be created or modified before this date.
fields.stock_frozen_upto_days: Stock transactions that are older than the mentioned days cannot be modified.
fields.role_allowed_to_create_edit_back_dated_t: If mentioned, the system will allow only the users with this Role to create or modify any stock transaction earlier than the latest stock transaction for a specific item and warehouse. If set as blank, it allows all users to create/edit back-dated transactions.
fields.stock_auth_role: The users with this Role are allowed to create/modify a stock transaction, even though the transaction is frozen.
